# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - 'feature/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        env:
          NODE_ENV: development

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 5

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'

    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com

    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write

    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
          # Replace with actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # aws s3 sync dist/ s3://staging-bucket/ --delete
          # or
          # az webapp deploy --name staging-app --src-path dist/
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
